'''dawuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mnemiopsin|mnemiopsin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mnemiopsin|mnemiopsin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dawuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæwijith|dæwijith]] || [[word:dæwijij|dæwijij]] || [[word:dæwijish|dæwijish]] || [[word:dæwiji|dæwiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dawuwujuth|dawuwujuth]] || [[word:dawuwujuj|dawuwujuj]] || [[word:dawuwujush|dawuwujush]] || [[word:dawuwuju|dawuwuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dawujuth|dawujuth]] || [[word:dawujuj|dawujuj]] || [[word:dawujush|dawujush]] || [[word:dawuju|dawuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dawufjuth|dawufjuth]] || [[word:dawufjuj|dawufjuj]] || [[word:dawufjush|dawufjush]] || [[word:dawufjuf|dawufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dawujuthu|dawujuthu]] || [[word:dawujuju|dawujuju]] || [[word:dawujushu|dawujushu]] || [[word:dawujuku|dawujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dawujuth|dawujuth]] || [[word:dawujuj|dawujuj]] || [[word:dawujush|dawujush]] || [[word:dawuju|dawuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dawujuthul|dawujuthul]] || [[word:dawujujul|dawujujul]] || [[word:dawujushul|dawujushul]] || [[word:dawujukul|dawujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dawujuthuthu|dawujuthuthu]] || [[word:dawujujuju|dawujujuju]] || [[word:dawujushushu|dawujushushu]] || [[word:dawujuku|dawujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dawujuthun|dawujuthun]] || [[word:dawujujun|dawujujun]] || [[word:dawujushun|dawujushun]] || [[word:dawujukun|dawujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dawujuthuoro|dawujuthuoro]] || [[word:dawujujuoro|dawujujuoro]] || [[word:dawujushuoro|dawujushuoro]] || [[word:dawujukuoro|dawujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
